input.testCaseTitle: Error popup while click on Bonded and coded folder and their inner folder
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-248 reported defect: Error popup while click on Bonded and coded folder and their inner folder

groundTruth.rootCauseDetail: Opening the Bonded and Coated folders triggered an error popup, and the fix was delivered as a code update on the development server. The source ticket does not preserve the actual exception text.
groundTruth.notesForEval: Numeric confidence 0.55. Hard case: evidence is mostly screenshots plus a generic code-updated confirmation, so Yogesh should review the original images if precision matters.
